title: Piquant Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A salty, creamy Dutch-style casserole that poaches tender chicken legs in a quick, nut-free sauce for a comforting dinner.
instructions: In a Dutch oven, melt butter over medium heat and sauté onions until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic, smoked paprika, and thyme, and stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Sprinkle flour over the mixture, whisk to form a roux, and cook for 1 minute to remove raw flavor.
Pour in milk and chicken broth, whisk until smooth, then bring to a gentle simmer.
Season the sauce with salt, pepper, bay leaf, and lemon juice, then add the chicken legs, skin side up.
Poach the chicken in the sauce for 10 minutes, then transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven.
Bake uncovered for 25 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the bay leaf, let rest 5 minutes, then serve hot.
